items.title: Reece James ‘devastated’ to see key Chelsea player leave as England star reveals first talk with Xabi Alonso
items.summary: REECE JAMES is “devastated” to see Marc Cucurella leave Chelsea for Real Madrid. Real completed a whirlwind deal to sign Spain star Cucurella for £48million last week, becoming one of the first buys of Jose Mourinho’s second spell at Los Blancos. items.title: Virgil van Dijk suffers World Cup injury scare as Liverpool star admits ‘I couldn’t feel my leg’
items.summary: VIRGIL VAN DIJK suffered a World Cup injury scare after admitting he "couldn't feel" part of his leg during Holland's thumping win over Sweden. items.title: Jude Bellingham reveals heartbreaking reason he gets emotional every time he sings God Save The King with England
items.summary: JUDE BELLINGHAM has revealed he thinks about his patriotic late grandad when he sings the national anthem. items.title: Dunkley creates England selection headache with standout performance
items.summary: Sophia Dunkley has given England a selection headache after her fine performance in England's 38-run win against Scotland in the ICC Women's T20 World Cup.

items.title: Mark Hughes' son Alex dies aged 38
items.summary: Wales legend Mark Hughes says he is "totally heartbroken" after the death of his son Alex aged 38.

items.summary: Some footballing stereotypes just won’t fade away. items.title: ‘Big fan’ Harry Kane and England pals forced to leave concert early to avoid breaching Tuchel’s World Cup curfew
items.summary: HARRY KANE got further into the cowboy spirit by attending a country concert on Friday night. items.title: Newcastle reject Spurs bid of about £80m for Tonali
items.summary: Newcastle United reject a bid from Tottenham Hotspur for midfielder Sandro Tonali of about £80m.

items.title: Undav clinches win over Ivory Coast as Germany reach knockouts
items.summary: Deniz Undav's 94th-minute goal clinched a come-from-behind 2-1 victory for Germany against Ivory Coast in Group E to send them into the World Cup knockout stages.

items.title: Fastest World Cup to 100 goals in 68 years - are balls and breaks behind it?
items.summary: The 2026 World Cup becomes the fastest edition of the tournament to hit 100 goals since 1958 - with the landmark reached in the 33rd game. But what is behind the scoring spree?

items.title: Doku criticised over plan to return home for birth
items.summary: Winger Jeremy Doku is criticised for saying he wants to leave Belgium's World Cup camp to be with his wife when she gives birth to their first child.

items.title: Undav scores twice as Germany fight back to beat Ivory Coast
items.summary: Deniz Undav rescues Germany with his second-half double helping them to come from behind to defeat Ivory Coast and book their place in the knockout stages of the World Cup.

items.title: Ivory Coast star breaks down in tears and consoled by staff as World Cup KO’d by devastating injury
items.summary: WILFRIED SINGO sobbed on the Ivory Coast bench after suffering a World Cup-ending injury against Germany. items.title: Price of England tickets for Ghana clash jump by £227 after Three Lions’ win over Croatia
items.summary: THE price of England World Cup tickets soared after the Three Lions’ win against Croatia gave fans belief the team can go all the way.
